description_long: This apartment building features a multi-story structure with a red gabled roof and a white facade, accented by large rectangular windows arranged in a regular grid. The front includes a spacious paved courtyard and a prominent entryway, with balconies and terraces visible on the upper floors. A rooftop terrace with a small tree and railing adds greenery and outdoor space. The building's side and rear elevations reveal a mix of solid walls and window groupings, as well as a stairwell and additional access points. The overall design blends traditional pitched-roof elements with modern, clean lines and open outdoor areas. The use of white walls, red roofing, and dark window frames creates a visually striking and contemporary appearance.
description: A multi-story white apartment building with a red gabled roof, large windows, balconies, and a rooftop terrace with greenery. The design combines traditional and modern elements, featuring a spacious courtyard and clean architectural lines.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main facade with large windows, balconies, a paved courtyard, and the main entrance, as well as the rooftop terrace with a tree.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the gabled roof, attic windows, and a partial cutaway revealing interior spaces and the rooftop terrace.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the solid white wall with minimal windows, the red roof, and the rooftop terrace with railing and greenery.
description_view_3: The opposite side view shows the rooftop terrace, additional windows, and the extension of the building with a flat roof and more windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are arranged in a regular, symmetrical grid pattern on the main facade, with groupings of two or three per floor and consistent vertical and horizontal alignment.
